title: valeriana stolonifera subsp. intermedia
intro: Valeriana stolonifera subsp. intermedia, also known as Japanese valerian or Japanese valeriana, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. Native to Japan, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, antispasmodic, and anticonvulsant effects. The health benefits of Valeriana stolonifera subsp. intermedia include relief from anxiety, insomnia, restlessness, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to act as a natural remedy for ADHD and other neurological disorders. Valeriana stolonifera subsp. intermedia is used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
